query:
-- Sales tab: sum of order.totalAmount (includes GST, delivery, minus discounts)
SELECT 
  'Sales Tab' as source,
  COUNT(*) as order_count,
  SUM(totalAmount) as total_amount_paise,
  SUM(totalAmount) / 100.0 as total_amount_rupees,
  SUM(subtotal) as subtotal_paise,
  SUM(subtotal) / 100.0 as subtotal_rupees,
  SUM(stateGst + centralGst) as total_gst_paise,
  SUM(stateGst + centralGst) / 100.0 as total_gst_rupees,
  SUM(deliveryCharge) as delivery_charge_paise,
  SUM(deliveryCharge) / 100.0 as delivery_charge_rupees,
  SUM(discountAmount) as discount_paise,
  SUM(discountAmount) / 100.0 as discount_rupees,
  SUM(loyaltyPointsUsed) as loyalty_paise,
  SUM(loyaltyPointsUsed) / 100.0 as loyalty_rupees
FROM orders 
WHERE orderStatus != 'cancelled' 
  AND createdAt >= '2026-01-01' 
  AND createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59';
